# SonoPrep

Licensed ultrasound question banks and exam prep tools for ARDMS certification.

## Products

### Question Banks (Product-Based Access)
- Ultrasound Physics Question Bank ($49) — 170+ questions mapped to ARDMS SPI content outline
- Abdominal Ultrasound Question Bank ($59) — 150+ clinical case-based questions
- Vascular Ultrasound Question Bank ($59) — 130+ RVT-focused vascular questions

### Exam Prep Tools (Bundled or Individual)
- Premium Bundle ($99) — everything below, one price
- SPI Flashcards ($24) — 200+ cards with SM-2 spaced repetition
- Exam Simulator ($49.99) — 110 domain-weighted questions per attempt
- Physics Pearls ($9) — 50 high-yield concept summaries
- Study Notes ($34) — 159-page guide across 10 chapters

## Access Model
- One-time purchase, 90-day access
- Free preview available (5 questions per question bank)
- 14-day full refund policy
- No subscription required

## Content
All questions are licensed and original — not AI-generated.
Content maps to the official ARDMS SPI content outline across 6 domains.

Users can preview questions before purchasing access.

## Pages
- / — Landing page
- /products — All products listing
- /products/[slug] — Individual question bank detail + purchase
- /[slug] — SEO topic pages (ultrasound-physics, abdominal-ultrasound, vascular-ultrasound)
- /practice/[slug] — Free preview practice with paywall after 5 questions
- /demo — Free exam simulator + flashcard demo
- /blog — Educational blog content
